chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Obligatory When an Animal Strikes a Person with Its Front or Hind Legs

text: 5349 - وَ رَوَى الْحَسَنُ بْنُ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ رِئَابٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع‌ فِي رَجُلٍ حَمَلَ عَبْدَهُ عَلَى دَابَّةٍ فَوَطِئَتْ رَجُلًا فَقَالَ الْغُرْمُ عَلَى مَوْلَاهُ‌.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5349 - Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub narrated from Ali ibn Ri'ab, who narrated from Abu Abdullah Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) regarding a man who placed his servant on an animal, and the animal trampled a man.
Imam (as) said: "The compensation is upon the master."
